scores.notes: Text accuracy is good overall, but there are a few minor OCR errors like 'Sweetl Potato' instead of 'Sweet Potato', 'Chilil Lime' instead of 'Chili Lime', and 'Carken' instead of 'Chicken'. Table structure is well preserved, with clear headers and data alignment. Numeric precision is high, with most numbers and decimal points correctly extracted. Layout preservation is also good, maintaining the logical flow of the document. Completeness is excellent, with almost all visible text captured.
